Third-party open-source assets bundled in Buddy
================================================

Geist (font)
  Files: assets/fonts/Geist-Variable.woff2
  Author: Vercel
  License: SIL Open Font License 1.1
  https://github.com/vercel/geist-font

Lucide (weather icons)
  The weather glyphs in the date header are inlined SVG paths from Lucide.
  (sun, moon, cloud, cloud-sun, cloud-moon, cloud-rain, cloud-drizzle,
   cloud-snow, cloud-fog, cloud-lightning, cloud-hail, cloud-sun-rain,
   cloud-moon-rain) plus the "gift" glyph in Settings.
  License: ISC
  https://github.com/lucide-icons/lucide

Weather data
  Open-Meteo (https://open-meteo.com) — free, no API key. CC BY 4.0.
  Approximate location via ipwho.is (free, no key).
